metadata.synopsis: Seventeen years after a woman is attacked by a barely glimpsed creature in a Mississippi swamp, her teenage son's beastly nature surfaces and he begins a reign of terror in this exciting story of a human-into monster transformation.
metadata.title: The Beast Within

metadata.synopsis: In this atmospheric horror classic directed by special effect legend Stan Winston, Ed Harley (Lance Henriksen) seeks the help of a witch to invoke the demon "Pumpkinhead" in order to exact revenge on the teenagers who inadvertently killed his son.
metadata.title: Pumpkinhead

metadata.synopsis: Five years after the massacre at Camp Arawak, Angela is now working at Camp Rolling Hills. She's still crazy...for camping and good clean fun, that is. But Angela draws the line at bad behavior and she's going to teach some naughty campers a lesson!
metadata.title: Sleepaway Camp II: Unhappy Campers

metadata.synopsis: Under inept new management, Camp Rolling Hills is now Camp New Horizons and it's the ideal setting for a notorious psychopath like Angela Baker to do what she does best, eliminating "immoral" teenagers with everything from a knife to a lawnmower.
metadata.title: Sleepaway Camp III: Teenage Wasteland

metadata.synopsis: Gather around the campfire....to die! After a cruel joke severely disfigures him, camp caretaker Cropsy is back -- with hedge clippers in hand -- seeking revenge on those who scarred him! Can the campers save themselves before he kills them all?
metadata.title: The Burning

metadata.synopsis: Newcomer Steve (James Marsden) is cautioned by Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) about the Blue Ribbons, a club of robotic, perfect students who rule the school. When Gavin turns into a "perfect" himself, Steve and Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigate.
metadata.title: Disturbing Behavior

metadata.synopsis: Carita inherits 5 million pesos from her godfather but she will not receive the money until she marries and her husband dies. She, her parents and boyfriend decide the a married with a dying man will be the solution of the problem. So, Carita marries Lazaro (who is dying)accepts the situation, but when he sees his fiancé, he recovers health. Lazaro disappear because he was unable to fulfill his compromise. Some days later a newspaper announces Lazaro's death. Nevertheless he reappears suddenly and explains that he is not Lazaro, the real one has died so Carita is a widow and can receive her inheritance. Lazaro and Carita fall in love and marry.
metadata.title: ¡Que viene mi marido!
